title: ALLAHU ROBBI

title: WAKAFA
content:
[Intro]
C G D
[Verse]
G D C G D G
Repeat 2x
[Bridge Instrument]
G F D# D
[Chorus]
G F C G / C G D G
[Interlude]
G C F Bb D# C D
G D# F D D# C D
Backto Verse - bridge - chorus
[Outro]
G

title: NAADI’ ALIYYAN
content:
[Intro]
E C D
[Verse]

A G F# E A C D E
[Interlude Gamelan]
A D G C F# B E -2x-
[Chorus]
E C E C E C A B 1x
C A B E 2x
Back to Verse - Verse Gamelan
[Bridge]
E C D E
Verse gamelan (break) – Verse – Interlude Gamelan (1x) – Chorus (1x) – Verse – Bridge - End

title: RINDU MUHAMMAD
content:

C

Back to Ya Robbi 1X
[Rap]
F -- C -- D Bb C
Bak to Ya Robbi - Ya Rasul - Ya Robbi & Rap 4
Outro : F
